headline: Manu Kone
body: Kone and Baleba strongly considered by Man Utd for third midfield signing. Roma's Manu Kone and Brighton's Carlos Baleba are two options who are being strongly considered by Manchester United as their search for a third midfield signing continues.
raw_text: Kone and Baleba strongly considered by Man Utd for third midfield signing. Roma's Manu Kone and Brighton's Carlos Baleba are two options who are being strongly considered by Manchester United as their search for a third midfield signing continues.
